positive: A central, stylized geometric pattern featuring abstract constellations and deep-sea bioluminescence. The style is neo-art deco mixed with psychedelic cosmicism. Palette dominated by midnight blue, electric cyan, sapphire, and hints of glowing magenta and emerald green. The composition should be symmetrical, highly contrasted, and centered for apparel printing, suitable for repeating wallpaper or large garment prints. Elements should include stylized celestial bodies (planets, rings, stars) intertwining with abstract flora and fauna motifs (whales, jellyfish silhouettes). High level of detail, crisp edges, clean vector aesthetic, dramatic contrast, cinematic lighting.
